description: The file '/home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/Viagra.csv' is already open in Jamovi. This dataset is from a pharmacological study (Field, 2013) examining the effect of Viagra dose on libido. Variables include 'dose' (1=Placebo, 2=Low dose, 3=High dose), 'libido' (self-reported libido score, 1-9), and 'partnerLibido'. Perform a One-Way ANOVA to examine the effect of 'dose' on 'libido'. The analysis must assume equal variances (Fisher's), include Tukey post hoc tests, and include a descriptives table.
